title: Verify issue stays open after PR (ship stage)
description: Verification task T16 to confirm issue #2085 remains OPEN after the ship stage creates a PR, and that the PR body contains 'Closes #2085'. This tests that the pipeline does not prematurely close issues when PRs are created - closing only happens on PR merge via the close-issue-on-merge workflow job.
existing_patterns: .kody/watch/agents/test-suite/agent.md lines 2001-2011 - T16 test definition with verification steps for issue lifecycle
.github/workflows/kody.yml lines 535-584 - close-issue-on-merge job that closes issues only on PR merge
